overall.description: A static establishing shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the Night City waterfront. The view captures a murky harbor with dock shacks in the foreground, a distinctive red suspension bridge spanning the water, and a dense futuristic skyline of glass and steel skyscrapers rising in the background with industrial smoke plumes drifting upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic harbor waterfront with industrial docks

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the harbor and city skyline from an elevated fixed position

entered.detail: red metal bridge structure spanning across the water with support cables
dense cluster of glass and steel skyscrapers with neon accents and towering spires
multiple smokestacks emitting white plumes into the sky
cluster of colorful makeshift structures and boats along the shoreline
brownish-green water surface filling the foreground of the harbor

segments.scene_description: A completely static wide shot of a futuristic harbor district. The murky water fills the foreground while colorful dock shacks line the right shore. A prominent red suspension bridge spans the middle distance, beyond which rises the dense glass skyline of a cyberpunk metropolis with industrial smokestacks venting steam. The camera remains fixed throughout, capturing the atmospheric haze and warm sunlight illuminating the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, wide-angle vista of a futuristic harbor district that maintains a consistent, atmospheric mood of industrial decay and urban grandeur. It begins with a view of murky waters in the foreground, where colorful dock shacks line the right shore under a warm, hazy sunlight. The gaze then extends across the middle distance to a prominent red suspension bridge that anchors the composition. Finally, the scene opens up to reveal a dense cyberpunk metropolis in the background, where towering glass skyscrapers and venting industrial smokestacks rise into the smoggy sky.
